subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Your letter was received, and from its perusal its contents became known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی نامه شما رسید و از قرائتش اطلاع بر مضمون حاصل گردید محافل بسیار
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
